125	```

128	GET    /auth/profile            # иҺ·еҸ–з”ЁжҲ·дҝЎжҒҜ

133	PUT    /favorites/:id           # жӣҙж–°ж”¶и—Ҹ

136	GET    /navigation/history      # иҺ·еҸ–еҜјиҲӘеҺҶеҸІ

```text
0	import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
1	import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
2	
3	// жү©еұ•Requestзұ»еһӢпјҢж·»еҠ userId
4	declare global {
5	  namespace Express {
6	    interface Request {
7	      userId?: number;
8	    }
9	  }
10	}
11	
12	const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_key';
13	
14	/**
15	 * JWTи®ӨиҜҒдёӯй—ҙд»¶
16	 */
17	export function authMiddleware(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) {
18	  try {
19	    // д»ҺиҜ·жұӮеӨҙиҺ·еҸ–token
20	    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
21	    
22	    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
23	      return res.status(401).json({
24	        code: 401,
25	        message: 'жңӘжҸҗдҫӣи®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢ'
26	      });
27	    }
28	    
29	    const token = authHeader.substring(7); // з§»йҷӨ "Bearer " еүҚзјҖ
30	    
31	    // йӘҢиҜҒtoken
32	    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: number };
33	    
34	    // е°Ҷз”ЁжҲ·IDж·»еҠ еҲ°иҜ·жұӮеҜ№иұЎ
35	    req.userId = decoded.userId;
36	    
37	    next();
38	  } catch (error) {
39	    if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
40	      return res.status(401).json({
41	        code: 401,
42	        message: 'и®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢе·ІиҝҮжңҹ'
43	      });
44	    }
45	    
46	    return res.status(401).json({
47	      code: 401,
48	      message: 'ж— ж•Ҳзҡ„и®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢ'
49	    });
50	  }
51	}
52	
53	/**
54	 * з”ҹжҲҗJWT token
55	 */
56	export function generateToken(userId: number): string {
57	  return jwt.sign(
58	    { userId },
59	    JWT_SECRET,
60	    { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' } as jwt.SignOptions
61	  );
62	}
63
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;

27	    const pageNum = Number(page);

29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // иҺ·еҸ–жҖ»ж•°

39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,

42	    );

44	    // иҪ¬жҚўеӯ—ж®өеҗҚпјҡдёӢеҲ’зәҝиҪ¬й©јеі°
```

```text
341	             (6371000 * acos(cos(radians(?)) * cos(radians(ul.latitude)) * 
342	              cos(radians(ul.longitude) - radians(?)) + 
343	              sin(radians(?)) * sin(radians(ul.latitude)))) AS distance
344	      FROM user_locations ul
345	      LEFT JOIN users u ON ul.user_id = u.id
```

```text
18	export async function recordVisit(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {

21	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern } = req.body;
22	    
23	    // йӘҢиҜҒеҸӮж•°
24	    if (!name || !latitude || !longitude) {
25	      return res.status(400).json({

28	      });
29	    }
30	    
31	    // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁпјҲдҪҝз”Ёеқҗж ҮеҲӨж–ӯпјҢе…Ғи®ёе°ҸиҢғеӣҙиҜҜе·®пјү
32	    const existing = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
33	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
34	       WHERE user_id = ? 
35	       AND ABS(latitude - ?) < 0.001 
36	       AND ABS(longitude - ?) < 0.001`,
37	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
38	    );
39	    
40	    if (existing.length > 0) {
41	      // жӣҙж–°и®ҝй—®ж¬Ўж•°е’Ңж—¶й—ҙ
42	      await query(
43	        `UPDATE frequent_locations 
44	         SET visit_count = visit_count + 1, 
45	             last_visit = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
46	             time_pattern = ?
47	         WHERE id = ?`,
48	        [timePattern, existing[0].id]
49	      );
50	      
51	      res.json({
52	        code: 200,
53	        message: 'и®ҝй—®и®°еҪ•жӣҙж–°жҲҗеҠҹ',
54	        data: {
55	          id: existing[0].id,
56	          visitCount: existing[0].visit_count + 1
57	        }
58	      });
59	    } else {
60	      // ж–°еўһи®°еҪ•
61	      const result: any = await query(
62	        `INSERT INTO frequent_locations 
63	         (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, visit_count, time_pattern) 
64	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?)`,
65	        [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern]
66	      );
67	      
68	      res.status(201).json({

72	          id: result.insertId,

206	    
207	    const updates: string[] = [];

215	      updates.push('address = ?');

228	    }
229	    
230	    params.push(id, userId);
231	    
232	    await query(

234	      params
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * зј“еӯҳжңҚеҠЎ
2	 * дҪҝз”ЁHarmonyOS Preferences APIе®һзҺ°жң¬ең°ж•°жҚ®зј“еӯҳ
3	 */
4	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
5	import { CacheMetadata } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	
7	export class CacheService {
8	  private static instance: CacheService;
9	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
10	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_cache';
11	  private readonly METADATA_SUFFIX = '_metadata';
12	  
13	  private constructor() {
14	    this.initPreferences();
15	  }
16	  
17	  /**
18	   * иҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢе®һдҫӢ
19	   */
20	  static getInstance(): CacheService {
21	    if (!CacheService.instance) {
22	      CacheService.instance = new CacheService();
23	    }
24	    return CacheService.instance;
25	  }
26	  
27	  /**
28	   * еҲқе§ӢеҢ–Preferences
29	   */
30	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
31	    try {
32	      const context = getContext();
33	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
34	      console.log('[CacheService] PreferencesеҲқе§ӢеҢ–жҲҗеҠҹ');
35	    } catch (err) {
36	      console.error('[CacheService] PreferencesеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еӨұиҙҘ:', JSON.stringify(err));
37	    }
38	  }
39	  
40	  /**
41	   * зЎ®дҝқPreferencesе·ІеҲқе§ӢеҢ–
42	   */
43	  private async ensurePreferences(): Promise<preferences.Preferences> {
44	    if (!this.preferencesInstance) {
45	      await this.initPreferences();
46	    }
47	    if (!this.preferencesInstance) {
48	      throw new Error('PreferencesжңӘеҲқе§ӢеҢ–');
49	    }
50	    return this.preferencesInstance;
51	  }
52	  
53	  /**
54	   * дҝқеӯҳзј“еӯҳ
55	   * @param key зј“еӯҳй”®
56	   * @param value зј“еӯҳеҖј
57	   * @param expireTime иҝҮжңҹж—¶й—ҙпјҲжҜ«з§’пјүпјҢеҸҜйҖү
58	   */
59	  async set<T>(key: string, value: T, expireTime?: number): Promise<void> {
60	    try {
61	      const prefs = await this.ensurePreferences();
62	      
63	      // дҝқеӯҳж•°жҚ®
64	      const jsonValue = JSON.stringify(value);
65	      await prefs.put(key, jsonValue);
66	      
67	      // дҝқеӯҳе…ғж•°жҚ®
68	      const metadata: CacheMetadata = {
69	        key,
70	        timestamp: Date.now(),
71	        expireTime
72	      };
73	      await prefs.put(key + this.METADATA_SUFFIX, JSON.stringify(metadata));
74	      
75	      await prefs.flush();
76	      console.log(`[CacheService] зј“еӯҳе·Ідҝқеӯҳ: ${key}`);
77	    } catch (err) {
78	      console.error(`[CacheService] дҝқеӯҳзј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ: ${key}`, err);
79	      throw new Error(`дҝқеӯҳзј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ: ${String(err)}`);
80	    }
81	  }
82	  
83	  /**
84	   * иҺ·еҸ–зј“еӯҳ
85	   * @param key зј“еӯҳй”®
86	   * @returns зј“еӯҳеҖјпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚеӯҳеңЁжҲ–е·ІиҝҮжңҹиҝ”еӣһnull
87	   */
88	  async get<T>(key: string): Promise<T | null> {
89	    try {
90	      const prefs = await this.ensurePreferences();
91	      
92	      // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰиҝҮжңҹ
93	      const isExpired = await this.isExpired(key);
94	      if (isExpired) {
95	        console.log(`[CacheService] зј“еӯҳе·ІиҝҮжңҹ: ${key}`);
96	        await this.remove(key);
97	        return null;
98	      }
99	      
100	      // иҺ·еҸ–ж•°жҚ®
101	      const jsonValue = await prefs.get(key, '');
102	      if (!jsonValue || jsonValue === '') {
103	        return null;
104	      }
105	      
106	      const value = JSON.parse(jsonValue as string) as T;
107	      console.log(`[CacheService] зј“еӯҳе‘Ҫдёӯ: ${key}`);
108	      return value;
109	    } catch (err) {
110	      console.error(`[CacheService] иҺ·еҸ–зј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ: ${key}`, err);
111	      return null;
112	    }
113	  }
114	  
115	  /**
116	   * еҲ йҷӨзј“еӯҳ
117	   * @param key зј“еӯҳй”®
118	   */
119	  async remove(key: string): Promise<void> {
120	    try {
121	      const prefs = await this.ensurePreferences();
122	      await prefs.delete(key);
123	      await prefs.delete(key + this.METADATA_SUFFIX);
124	      await prefs.flush();
125	      console.log(`[CacheService] зј“еӯҳе·ІеҲ йҷӨ: ${key}`);
126	    } catch (err) {
127	      console.error(`[CacheService] еҲ йҷӨзј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ: ${key}`, err);
128	    }
129	  }
130	  
131	  /**
132	   * жё…йҷӨжүҖжңүзј“еӯҳ
133	   */
134	  async clear(): Promise<void> {
135	    try {
136	      const prefs = await this.ensurePreferences();
137	      await prefs.clear();
138	      await prefs.flush();
139	      console.log('[CacheService] жүҖжңүзј“еӯҳе·Іжё…йҷӨ');
140	    } catch (err) {
141	      console.error('[CacheService] жё…йҷӨзј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ:', err);
142	      throw new Error(`жё…йҷӨзј“еӯҳеӨұиҙҘ: ${String(err)}`);
143	    }
144	  }
145	  
146	  /**
147	   * жЈҖжҹҘзј“еӯҳжҳҜеҗҰиҝҮжңҹ
148	   * @param key зј“еӯҳй”®
149	   * @returns trueиЎЁзӨәе·ІиҝҮжңҹпјҢfalseиЎЁзӨәжңӘиҝҮжңҹ
150	   */
151	  async isExpired(key: string): Promise<boolean> {
152	    try {
153	      const metadata = await this.getCacheMetadata(key);
154	      if (!metadata) {
155	        return true;
156	      }
157	      
158	      // еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүи®ҫзҪ®иҝҮжңҹж—¶й—ҙпјҢеҲҷж°ёдёҚиҝҮжңҹ
159	      if (!metadata.expireTime) {
160	        return false;
161	      }
162	      
163	      const now = Date.now();
164	      const expireAt = metadata.timestamp + metadata.expireTime;
165	      return now > expireAt;
166	    } catch (err) {
167	      console.error(`[CacheService] жЈҖжҹҘиҝҮжңҹеӨұиҙҘ: ${key}`, err);
168	      return true;
169	    }
170	  }
171	  
172	  /**
173	   * иҺ·еҸ–зј“еӯҳе…ғж•°жҚ®
174	   * @param key зј“еӯҳй”®
175	   * @returns зј“еӯҳе…ғж•°жҚ®пјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚеӯҳеңЁиҝ”еӣһnull
176	   */
177	  private async getCacheMetadata(key: string): Promise<CacheMetadata | null> {
178	    try {
179	      const prefs = await this.ensurePreferences();
180	      const metadataJson = await prefs.get(key + this.METADATA_SUFFIX, '');
181	      
182	      if (!metadataJson || metadataJson === '') {
183	        return null;
184	      }
185	      
186	      return JSON.parse(metadataJson as string) as CacheMetadata;
187	    } catch (err) {
188	      console.error(`[CacheService] иҺ·еҸ–е…ғж•°жҚ®еӨұиҙҘ: ${key}`, err);
189	      return null;
190	    }
191	  }
192	}
193
```

```text
185	  toggleExpand() {
186	    if (!this.isExpanded) {
187	      const safePadding = this.EXPAND_RADIUS + (this.ITEM_SIZE / 2) + 10;
188	      let cX = this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
189	      let cY = this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
190	      let nCX = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cX, this.screenWidthVp - safePadding));
191	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
192

194	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);

284	    })
285	    .zIndex(9999)
286	    .scale({ x: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0, y: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0 })

293	  PureMainBall(): void {
294	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
295	      Text("пјӢ")
296	        .fontSize(26).fontColor('#FFFFFF').fontWeight(FontWeight.Lighter)

308	    .position({ x: this.ballX, y: this.ballY })
309	    .zIndex(10000)
310	    .onClick(() => {

314	    .gesture(

316	        .onActionStart(() => {
317	          if (this.isExpanded) this.toggleExpand()
318	          this.startX = this.ballX; this.startY = this.ballY
319	        })
320	        .onActionUpdate((e) => {
321	          let rX = this.startX + e.offsetX; let rY = this.startY + e.offsetY
322	          this.ballX = Math.max(0, Math.min(rX, this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
323	          this.ballY = Math.max(0, Math.min(rY, this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
324	        })
325	    )
326	  }
327	}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
255	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
256	    try {
257	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
258	      const year = date.getFullYear()
259	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
260	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
261	      return `${year}-${month}-${day}`
262	    } catch (err) {
263	      return dateStr
264	    }
265	  }
266	}
```

```text
216	  async loadHistory() {
217	    this.isLoading = true
218	    this.errorMessage = ''
219	    this.currentPage = 1
220	    
221	    try {
222	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
223	      
224	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
225	        this.historyList = response.data.list
226	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
227	      } else {
228	        this.errorMessage = response.message || 'еҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘ'
229	      }
230	    } catch (err) {
231	      console.error('[HistoryPage] еҠ иҪҪеҺҶеҸІи®°еҪ•еӨұиҙҘ:', err)
232	      this.errorMessage = 'еҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘпјҢиҜ·зЁҚеҗҺйҮҚиҜ•'
233	    } finally {
234	      this.isLoading = false
235	    }
236	  }
237	  
238	  /**
239	   * еҠ иҪҪжӣҙеӨҡ
240	   */
241	  async loadMore() {
242	    if (this.isLoading || !this.hasMore) {
243	      return
244	    }
245	    
246	    this.isLoading = true
247	    this.currentPage++
248	    
249	    try {
250	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
251	      
252	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
253	        this.historyList = this.historyList.concat(response.data.list)
254	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
255	      }
256	    } catch (err) {
257	      console.error('[HistoryPage] еҠ иҪҪжӣҙеӨҡеӨұиҙҘ:', err)
258	      this.currentPage--
259	    } finally {
260	      this.isLoading = false
261	    }
262	  }

327	  
328	  /**
329	   * ж јејҸеҢ–и·қзҰ»
330	   */
331	  formatDistance(meters: number): string {
332	    if (meters < 1000) {
333	      return `${meters}зұі`
334	    } else {
335	      return `${(meters / 1000).toFixed(1)}е…¬йҮҢ`
336	    }
337	  }
338	  
339	  /**
340	   * ж јејҸеҢ–ж—¶й•ҝ
341	   */
342	  formatDuration(seconds: number): string {
343	    if (seconds < 60) {
344	      return `${seconds}з§’`
345	    } else if (seconds < 3600) {
346	      return `${Math.floor(seconds / 60)}еҲҶй’ҹ`
347	    } else {
348	      const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600)
349	      const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
350	      return `${hours}е°Ҹж—¶${minutes}еҲҶй’ҹ`
351	    }
352	  }
353	  
354	  /**
355	   * ж јејҸеҢ–ж—Ҙжңҹ
356	   */
357	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
358	    try {
359	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
360	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
361	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
362	      const hour = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
363	      const minute = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
364	      return `${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}`
365	    } catch (err) {
366	      return dateStr
367	    }
368	  }
369	}
370
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
93	    try {
94	      this.avPlayer = await media.createAVPlayer();
95	      this.avPlayer.audioRendererInfo = {usage: audio.StreamUsage.STREAM_USAGE_MUSIC, rendererFlags: 0};
96	      this.setAVPlayerCallback();
97	      if(this.currentSong) this.avPlayer.url = this.currentSong.url;
98	    } catch(e) {
99	      console.error('AVPlayer Init Error:', e);
100	    }
101	  }
102	
103	  releasePlayer(): void { try { if(this.avPlayer) this.avPlayer.release(); } catch(e){} }
104	
105	  setAVPlayerCallback(): void {
106	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
107	    this.avPlayer.on('stateChange', async (state: media.AVPlayerState) => {
108	      switch(state) {
109	        case 'initialized': try{ await this.avPlayer!.prepare(); }catch(e){} break;
110	        case 'prepared':
111	          this.totalTime = this.avPlayer!.duration;
112	          if(this.currentSong) this.updateSessionMetadata(this.currentSong);
113	          if(this.isPlaying) try{this.avPlayer!.play();}catch(e){}
114	          break;
115	        case 'playing':
116	          this.isPlaying = true;
117	          this.startRotateAnim();
118	          this.updateSessionPlaybackState(avSession.PlaybackState.PLAYBACK_STATE_PLAY, this.currentTime);
119	          break;
120	        case 'paused':
121	          this.isPlaying = false;
122	          this.stopRotateAnim();
123	          this.updateSessionPlaybackState(avSession.PlaybackState.PLAYBACK_STATE_PAUSE, this.currentTime);
124	          break;
125	        case 'completed': this.playNext(); break;
126	      }
127	    });
128	    this.avPlayer.on('timeUpdate', (time) => this.currentTime = time);
129	  }
130	
131	  async playSong(song: Song): Promise<void> {
132	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
133	    if(this.currentSong?.id === song.id) { this.togglePlay(); return; }
134	    this.currentSong = song;
135	    this.isPlaying = true;
136	    this.rotateAngle = 0;
137	    try{ await this.avPlayer.reset(); this.avPlayer.url = song.url; }catch(e){}
138	  }
139	
140	  async togglePlay(): Promise<void> {
141	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
142	    try{ if(this.isPlaying) await this.avPlayer.pause(); else await this.avPlayer.play(); }catch(e){}
143	  }
144	
145	  playNext(): void {
146	    if(!this.currentSong) return;
147	    let idx = this.songList.findIndex(i=>i.id===this.currentSong?.id);
148	    this.playSong(this.songList[(idx+1)%this.songList.length]);
149	  }
150	
151	  playPrev(): void {
152	    if(!this.currentSong) return;
153	    let idx = this.songList.findIndex(i=>i.id===this.currentSong?.id);
154	    this.playSong(this.songList[idx===0?this.songList.length-1:idx-1]);
155	  }
156	
157	  startRotateAnim(): void { clearInterval(this.timer); this.timer = setInterval(() => { this.rotateAngle = (this.rotateAngle+0.2)%360; }, 16); }
158	  stopRotateAnim(): void { clearInterval(this.timer); }
159	  startSpectrumAnim(): void {}
160	  formatTime(ms: number): string { if(!ms||ms<0) return '00:00'; let s=Math.floor(ms/1000); return `${Math.floor(s/60).toString().padStart(2,'0')}:${(s%60).toString().padStart(2,'0')}`; }
161	
162	  build() {
163	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) { // еҶ…е®№еә•йғЁеҜ№йҪҗ
164	
165	      // 1. иғҢжҷҜеұӮ
166	      if (this.currentSong) {
167	        Image(this.currentSong.cover).width('120%').height('120%').blur(100).opacity(0.4).objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
168	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%').fill(Color.Black).opacity(0.5)
169	      } else {
170	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%').fill('#0F172A')
171	      }
172	
173	      // 2. е”ұзүҮеҢә (еұ…дёӯ)

175	        Stack() {

177	          Image(this.currentSong?.cover).width(180).height(180).borderRadius(90).rotate({ angle: this.rotateAngle })
178	        }
179	        Text(this.currentSong?.title).fontSize(32).fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold).fontColor(Color.White).margin({ top: 30 })
180	        Text(this.currentSong?.artist).fontSize(16).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.6)').margin({ top: 8 })
181	      }
182	      .width('100%')
183	      .height('100%')
184	      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
185	      .padding({ bottom: 150 }) // з»ҷеә•йғЁжҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°и…ҫеҮәз©әй—ҙ
186	
187	      // 3. еә•йғЁжӮ¬жө®жҺ§еҲ¶еІӣ (йҒҝи®©е·ҰдёӢи§’)
188	      Column() {
189	        // иҝӣеәҰ
190	        Row() {
191	          Text(this.formatTime(this.currentTime)).fontSize(12).fontColor('#AAA')
192	          Slider({ value: this.currentTime, min: 0, max: this.totalTime })
193	            .layoutWeight(1).trackColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.1)').selectedColor('#00E5FF').margin({ left: 10, right: 10 })
194	            .onChange((v, m) => { if(m===SliderChangeMode.End) try{this.avPlayer?.seek(v)}catch(e){} })
195	          Text(this.formatTime(this.totalTime)).fontSize(12).fontColor('#AAA')
196	        }.width('90%').margin({ bottom: 20 })
197	
198	        // жҢүй’®

201	          Button() { Text(this.isPlaying ? "вҸё" : "в–¶").fontSize(32).fontColor(Color.White) }
202	          .width(72).height(72).borderRadius(36).backgroundColor('#00E5FF').shadow({ radius: 20, color: 'rgba(0,229,255,0.4)' })
203	          .onClick(() => this.togglePlay())
```

```text
116	  pauseNavigation(): void {

126	  resumeNavigation(): void {

137	    if (!this.navigationInfo) return;
138	    
139	    try {
140	      const currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
141	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, this.navigationInfo.destination, 0);
142	      
143	      this.mapService.clearOverlays();
144	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
145	      
146	      if (this.navigationInfo) {
147	        this.navigationInfo.currentLocation = currentLocation;
148	        this.navigationInfo.route = route;
149	        this.navigationInfo.remainingDistance = route.distance;
150	        this.navigationInfo.remainingTime = route.duration;
151	        this.navigationInfo.currentStepIndex = 0;
152	        this.navigationInfo.nextInstruction = route.steps[0]?.instruction || '';
153	        this.notifyListeners();
154	      }
155	    } catch (err) {

157	    }
158	  }

163	  getNavigationInfo(): NavigationInfo | null {

169	   */
170	  addListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {

172	  }
173	  
174	  /**
175	   * з§»йҷӨеҜјиҲӘзҠ¶жҖҒзӣ‘еҗ¬еҷЁ
176	   */
177	  removeListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
178	    const index = this.listeners.indexOf(listener);
179	    if (index > -1) {
180	      this.listeners.splice(index, 1);
181	    }
182	  }
183	  
184	  /**

186	   */
187	  private updateNavigationInfo(info: NavigationInfo): void {

191	  
192	  /**

194	   */
195	  private notifyListeners(): void {
196	    if (this.navigationInfo) {

200	        } catch (err) {
201	          console.error('Listener error:', err);
202	        }
203	      });
204	    }
205	  }
206	}
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * й«ҳеҫ·ең°еӣҫAPIжңҚеҠЎ
2	 * ж–ҮжЎЈ: https://lbs.amap.com/api/webservice/summary

4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult } from '../models/NavigationModels';
6	
7	// й«ҳеҫ·ең°еӣҫAPIй…ҚзҪ®
8	const AMAP_KEY = '2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153';  // TODO: жӣҝжҚўдёәдҪ зҡ„API Key
9	const AMAP_BASE_URL = 'https://restapi.amap.com/v3';
10	
11	/**
12	 * й«ҳеҫ·ең°еӣҫжңҚеҠЎзұ»
13	 */
14	export class AmapService {
15	  private static instance: AmapService;
16	  
17	  private constructor() {}
18	  
19	  static getInstance(): AmapService {
20	    if (!AmapService.instance) {
21	      AmapService.instance = new AmapService();
22	    }
23	    return AmapService.instance;
24	  }
25	  
26	  /**
27	   * еҸ‘йҖҒHTTPиҜ·жұӮ
28	   */
29	  private async request(url: string): Promise<Record<string, Object>> {
30	    return new Promise<Record<string, Object>>((resolve, reject) => {
31	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
32	      
33	      httpRequest.request(url, {
34	        method: http.RequestMethod.GET,
35	        readTimeout: 30000,
36	        connectTimeout: 30000
37	      }, (err, data) => {
38	        if (err) {
39	          console.error('Amap request error:', err);
40	          httpRequest.destroy();
41	          reject(err);
42	          return;
43	        }
44	        
45	        try {
46	          const response = JSON.parse(data.result as string) as Record<string, Object>;
47	          const status = response['status'] as string;
48	          if (status === '1') {
49	            resolve(response);
50	          } else {
51	            const info = response['info'] as string;
52	            reject(new Error(info || 'иҜ·жұӮеӨұиҙҘ'));
53	          }
54	        } catch (parseErr) {
55	          reject(new Error('е“Қеә”и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ'));
56	        } finally {
57	          httpRequest.destroy();
58	        }
59	      });
60	    });
61	  }
62	  
63	  /**
64	   * IPе®ҡдҪҚ - йҖҡиҝҮIPең°еқҖиҺ·еҸ–еӨ§иҮҙдҪҚзҪ®(дёҚйңҖиҰҒGPS)
65	   */
66	  async getLocationByIP(): Promise<Location | null> {
67	    try {
68	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/ip?key=${AMAP_KEY}`;
69	      console.log('[AmapService] IPе®ҡдҪҚиҜ·жұӮ:', url);
70	      
71	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
72	      
73	      const province = response['province'] as string;
74	      const city = response['city'] as string;
75	      const rectangle = response['rectangle'] as string;
76	      
77	      console.log('[AmapService] IPе®ҡдҪҚз»“жһң - зңҒд»Ҫ:', province, 'еҹҺеёӮ:', city);
78	      
79	      if (rectangle && rectangle.length > 0) {
80	        // rectangleж јејҸ: "з»ҸеәҰ1,зә¬еәҰ1;з»ҸеәҰ2,зә¬еәҰ2"
81	        const parts = rectangle.split(';');
82	        if (parts.length >= 1) {
83	          const coords = parts[0].split(',');
84	          const lng = parseFloat(coords[0]);
85	          const lat = parseFloat(coords[1]);
86	          
87	          console.log('[AmapService] IPе®ҡдҪҚеқҗж Ү:', lat, lng);
88	          
89	          return {
90	            latitude: lat,
91	            longitude: lng,
92	            address: province + city,
93	            name: 'IPе®ҡдҪҚ'
94	          };
95	        }
96	      }
97	      
98	      return null;
99	    } catch (err) {
100	      console.error('[AmapService] IPе®ҡдҪҚеӨұиҙҘ:', JSON.stringify(err));
101	      return null;
102	    }
103	  }
104	  
105	  /**
106	   * ең°зҗҶзј–з Ғ - ең°еқҖиҪ¬еқҗж Ү
107	   */
108	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
109	    try {
110	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/geo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&address=${encodeURIComponent(address)}`;
111	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
112	      
113	      const geocodes = response['geocodes'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
114	      if (geocodes && geocodes.length > 0) {
115	        const geo: Record<string, Object> = geocodes[0];
116	        const locationStr = geo['location'] as string;
117	        const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
118	        const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
119	        const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
120	        
121	        return {
122	          latitude: lat,
123	          longitude: lng,
124	          address: geo['formatted_address'] as string,
125	          name: address
126	        };
127	      }
128	      
129	      return null;
130	    } catch (err) {
131	      console.error('Geocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
132	      return null;
133	    }
134	  }
135	  
136	  /**
137	   * йҖҶең°зҗҶзј–з Ғ - еқҗж ҮиҪ¬ең°еқҖ
138	   */
139	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
140	    try {
141	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/regeo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}`;
142	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
143	      
144	      const regeocode = response['regeocode'] as Record<string, Object>;
145	      if (regeocode) {
146	        return regeocode['formatted_address'] as string;
147	      }
148	      
149	      return 'жңӘзҹҘең°еқҖ';
150	    } catch (err) {
151	      console.error('Regeocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
152	      return 'жңӘзҹҘең°еқҖ';
153	    }
154	  }
155	  
156	  /**
157	   * и·Ҝеҫ„и§„еҲ’ - й©ҫиҪҰ
158	   */
159	  async planRoute(origin: Location, destination: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo | null> {
160	    try {
161	      const originStr = `${origin.longitude},${origin.latitude}`;
162	      const destStr = `${destination.longitude},${destination.latitude}`;
163	      
164	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/direction/driving?key=${AMAP_KEY}&origin=${originStr}&destination=${destStr}&strategy=${strategy}&extensions=all`;
165	      
166	      console.log('[AmapService] иҜ·жұӮи·Ҝеҫ„и§„еҲ’ URL:', url);
167	      
168	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
169	      
170	      console.log('[AmapService] и·Ҝеҫ„и§„еҲ’е“Қеә” status:', response['status']);
171	      
172	      const route = response['route'] as Record<string, Object>;
173	      if (route) {
174	        const paths = route['paths'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
175	        console.log('[AmapService] paths ж•°йҮҸ:', paths ? paths.length : 0);
176	        
177	        if (paths && paths.length > 0) {
178	          const path: Record<string, Object> = paths[0];
179	          
180	          console.log('[AmapService] path еҜ№иұЎ keys:', Object.keys(path).join(', '));
181	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline еҖј:', path['polyline']);
182	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline зұ»еһӢ:', typeof path['polyline']);
183	          
184	          // и§Јжһҗи·ҜзәҝжӯҘйӘӨ
185	          const steps: RouteStep[] = [];
186	          const pathSteps = path['steps'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
187	          if (pathSteps) {
188	            for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
189	              const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
190	              const roadValue = step['road'];
191	              const actionValue = step['action'];
192	              steps.push({
193	                instruction: step['instruction'] as string,
194	                distance: parseInt(step['distance'] as string),
195	                duration: parseInt(step['duration'] as string),
196	                road: (roadValue !== null && roadValue !== undefined) ? (roadValue as string) : '',
197	                action: (actionValue !== null && actionValue !== undefined) ? (actionValue as string) : ''
198	              });
199	            }
200	          }
201	          
202	          const tollDistValue = path['toll_distance'];
203	          const tollsValue = path['tolls'];
204	          const trafficValue = path['traffic_lights'];
205	          
206	          // иҺ·еҸ– polylineпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚеӯҳеңЁеҲҷд»Һ steps дёӯжӢјжҺҘ
207	          let polyline = path['polyline'] as string;
208	          
209	          if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
210	            console.log('[AmapService] polyline дёәз©әпјҢе°қиҜ•д»Һ steps дёӯиҺ·еҸ–');
211	            // д»Һ steps дёӯжӢјжҺҘ polyline
212	            const polylines: string[] = [];
213	            if (pathSteps) {
214	              for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
215	                const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
216	                const stepPolyline = step['polyline'] as string;
217	                if (stepPolyline && stepPolyline.length > 0) {
218	                  polylines.push(stepPolyline);
219	                }
220	              }
221	            }
222	            polyline = polylines.join(';');
223	            console.log('[AmapService] жӢјжҺҘеҗҺзҡ„ polyline й•ҝеәҰ:', polyline.length);
224	          }
225	          
226	          console.log('[AmapService] жңҖз»Ҳ polyline й•ҝеәҰ:', polyline ? polyline.length : 0);
227	          
228	          return {
229	            distance: parseInt(path['distance'] as string),
230	            duration: parseInt(path['duration'] as string),
231	            polyline: polyline || '',
232	            steps: steps,
233	            strategy: strategy,
234	            tollDistance: parseInt((tollDistValue !== null && tollDistValue !== undefined) ? (tollDistValue as string) : '0'),
235	            tollCost: parseInt((tollsValue !== null && tollsValue !== undefined) ? (tollsValue as string) : '0'),
236	            trafficLights: parseInt((trafficValue !== null && trafficValue !== undefined) ? (trafficValue as string) : '0')
237	          };
238	        }
239	      }
240	      
241	      console.log('[AmapService] и·Ҝеҫ„и§„еҲ’еӨұиҙҘ: жІЎжңүжүҫеҲ°жңүж•Ҳи·Ҝеҫ„');
242	      return null;
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('Plan route error:', JSON.stringify(err));
245	      return null;
246	    }
247	  }
248	  
249	  /**
250	   * POIжҗңзҙў - е…ій”®иҜҚжҗңзҙў
251	   */
252	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
253	    try {
254	      let url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/place/text?key=${AMAP_KEY}&keywords=${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}`;
255	      
256	      if (location !== null) {
257	        url += `&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}&radius=${radius}&sortrule=distance`;
258	      }
```

```text
136	  async cancelShare(shareId: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
137	    try {
138	      console.log('[LocationShareService] еҸ–ж¶ҲдҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«, shareId:', shareId);
139	      
140	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
141	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_SHARING_DETAIL(shareId),
142	        true
143	      );
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[LocationShareService] еҸ–ж¶ҲдҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«еӨұиҙҘ:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * иҺ·еҸ–йҷ„иҝ‘з”ЁжҲ·
154	   */
155	  async getNearbyUsers(latitude: number, longitude: number, radius?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<NearbyUser[]>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[LocationShareService] иҺ·еҸ–йҷ„иҝ‘з”ЁжҲ·');
158	      
159	      let url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_NEARBY}?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}`;
160	      if (radius) {
161	        url += `&radius=${radius}`;
162	      }
163	      
164	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NearbyUser[]>(url, true);
165	      
166	      return response;
167	    } catch (err) {
168	      console.error('[LocationShareService] иҺ·еҸ–йҷ„иҝ‘з”ЁжҲ·еӨұиҙҘ:', err);
169	      return err as ApiResponse<NearbyUser[]>;
170	    }
171	  }
172	  
173	  /**
174	   * еҗҜеҠЁиҮӘеҠЁжӣҙж–°дҪҚзҪ®
175	   */
176	  startAutoUpdate(): void {
177	    // еҰӮжһңе·Із»ҸеңЁиҝҗиЎҢпјҢе…ҲеҒңжӯў
178	    if (this.autoUpdateTimer !== -1) {
179	      this.stopAutoUpdate();
180	    }
181	    
182	    console.log('[LocationShareService] еҗҜеҠЁиҮӘеҠЁжӣҙж–°дҪҚзҪ®');
183	    this.shareStartTime = Date.now();
184	    
185	    // дҪҝз”ЁжӯҰжұүй»ҳи®Өеқҗж Ү
186	    const defaultLocation: Partial<UserLocation> = {
187	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
188	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
189	      accuracy: 100,
190	      locationType: 'ip',
191	      isSharing: true
192	    };
193	    
194	    // з«ӢеҚіжӣҙж–°дёҖж¬Ў
195	    this.updateLocation(defaultLocation);
196	    
197	    // и®ҫзҪ®е®ҡж—¶еҷЁпјҢжҜҸ30з§’жӣҙж–°дёҖж¬Ў
198	    this.autoUpdateTimer = setInterval(() => {
199	      // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰи¶…иҝҮ24е°Ҹж—¶
200	      const elapsed = Date.now() - this.shareStartTime;
201	      if (elapsed >= this.MAX_SHARE_DURATION) {
202	        console.log('[LocationShareService] е…ұдә«и¶…иҝҮ24е°Ҹж—¶пјҢиҮӘеҠЁеҒңжӯў');
203	        this.stopAutoUpdate();
204	        this.toggleSharing(false);
205	        return;
206	      }
207	      
208	      // жӣҙж–°дҪҚзҪ®
209	      this.updateLocation(defaultLocation);
210	    }, this.AUTO_UPDATE_INTERVAL);
211	  }
212	  
213	  /**
214	   * еҒңжӯўиҮӘеҠЁжӣҙж–°дҪҚзҪ®
215	   */
216	  stopAutoUpdate(): void {
217	    if (this.autoUpdateTimer !== -1) {
218	      console.log('[LocationShareService] еҒңжӯўиҮӘеҠЁжӣҙж–°дҪҚзҪ®');
219	      clearInterval(this.autoUpdateTimer);
220	      this.autoUpdateTimer = -1;
221	      this.shareStartTime = 0;
222	    }
223	  }
224	}
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * ж—Ҙжңҹж—¶й—ҙе·Ҙе…·зұ»
2	 */
3	export class DateUtils {
4	  /**
5	   * ж јејҸеҢ–ж—Ҙжңҹж—¶й—ҙ
6	   * @param date ж—ҘжңҹеҜ№иұЎжҲ–ISOеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
7	   * @param format ж јејҸпјҲй»ҳи®ӨпјҡYYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ssпјү
8	   */
9	  static format(date: Date | string, format: string = 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss'): string {
10	    const d = typeof date === 'string' ? new Date(date) : date;
11	    
12	    const year = d.getFullYear();
13	    const month = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
14	    const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
15	    const hours = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
16	    const minutes = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
17	    const seconds = String(d.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
18	    
19	    return format
20	      .replace('YYYY', String(year))
21	      .replace('MM', month)
22	      .replace('DD', day)
23	      .replace('HH', hours)
24	      .replace('mm', minutes)
25	      .replace('ss', seconds);
26	  }
27	  
28	  /**
29	   * ж јејҸеҢ–зӣёеҜ№ж—¶й—ҙпјҲеҰӮпјҡеҲҡеҲҡгҖҒ5еҲҶй’ҹеүҚгҖҒжҳЁеӨ©пјү
30	   */
31	  static formatRelative(date: Date | string): string {
32	    const d = typeof date === 'string' ? new Date(date) : date;
33	    const now = new Date();
34	    const diff = now.getTime() - d.getTime();
35	    
36	    const seconds = Math.floor(diff / 1000);
37	    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
38	    const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
39	    const days = Math.floor(hours / 24);
40	    
41	    if (seconds < 60) {
42	      return 'еҲҡеҲҡ';
43	    } else if (minutes < 60) {
44	      return `${minutes}еҲҶй’ҹеүҚ`;
45	    } else if (hours < 24) {
46	      return `${hours}е°Ҹж—¶еүҚ`;
47	    } else if (days === 1) {
48	      return 'жҳЁеӨ©';
49	    } else if (days < 7) {
50	      return `${days}еӨ©еүҚ`;
51	    } else {
52	      return DateUtils.format(d, 'YYYY-MM-DD');
53	    }
54	  }
55	  
56	  /**
57	   * ж јејҸеҢ–ж—¶й•ҝпјҲз§’иҪ¬дёәеҸҜиҜ»ж јејҸпјү
58	   */
59	  static formatDuration(seconds: number): string {
60	    const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
61	    const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
62	    
63	    if (hours > 0) {
64	      return `${hours}е°Ҹж—¶${minutes}еҲҶй’ҹ`;
65	    } else {
66	      return `${minutes}еҲҶй’ҹ`;
67	    }
68	  }
69	  
70	  /**
71	   * ж јејҸеҢ–и·қзҰ»пјҲзұіиҪ¬дёәеҸҜиҜ»ж јејҸпјү
72	   */
73	  static formatDistance(meters: number): string {
74	    if (meters < 1000) {
75	      return `${Math.round(meters)}зұі`;
76	    } else {
77	      return `${(meters / 1000).toFixed(1)}е…¬йҮҢ`;
78	    }
79	  }
```

546	### 4.1 Hook еҹәзЎҖ
547	
548	Hook ж–Үд»¶ж”ҫеңЁ `.kiro/hooks/` зӣ®еҪ•пјҢж јејҸдёә JSONпјҲ`.json` жү©еұ•еҗҚпјүгҖӮ

554	| `fileEdited` | ж–Үд»¶дҝқеӯҳж—¶ | Lint жЈҖжҹҘгҖҒжөӢиҜ•иҝҗиЎҢ |
555	| `fileCreated` | ж–Үд»¶еҲӣе»әж—¶ | иҮӘеҠЁж·»еҠ ж–Үд»¶еӨҙ |
556	| `fileDeleted` | ж–Үд»¶еҲ йҷӨж—¶ | жё…зҗҶзӣёе…іж–Үд»¶ |
557	| `userTriggered` | жүӢеҠЁзӮ№еҮ»жҢүй’® | Commit ж¶ҲжҒҜгҖҒд»Јз Ғе®ЎжҹҘ |
558	| `promptSubmit` | жҸҗдәӨ prompt ж—¶ | жқЎд»¶жЈҖжҹҘгҖҒдёҠдёӢж–Үеўһејә |
559	| `agentStop` | Agent е®ҢжҲҗж—¶ | иҮӘеҠЁжҖ»з»“гҖҒе®үе…Ёжү«жҸҸ |
560	| `preToolUse` | е·Ҙе…·жү§иЎҢеүҚ | жқғйҷҗжҺ§еҲ¶гҖҒеҶҷж“ҚдҪңжӢҰжҲӘ |
561	| `postToolUse` | е·Ҙе…·жү§иЎҢеҗҺ | з»“жһңе®ЎжҹҘгҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ• |
562	
563	#### еҠЁдҪңзұ»еһӢ
564	
565	| еҠЁдҪң | иҜҙжҳҺ | йҖӮз”Ёи§ҰеҸ‘зұ»еһӢ |
566	|-----|------|-------------|
567	| `askAgent` | и®© AI жү§иЎҢд»»еҠЎ | жүҖжңүзұ»еһӢ |
568	| `runCommand` | иҝҗиЎҢ shell е‘Ҫд»Ө | `promptSubmit`, `agentStop`, `preToolUse`, `postToolUse` |
569	
570	### 4.2 жҺЁиҚҗ Hook й…ҚзҪ®пјҲ5 дёӘпјү
571	
572	#### в‘  task-completion-pipeline.json вҖ” д»»еҠЎе®ҢжҲҗ PipelineпјҲж ёеҝғпјү
573	
574	е°Ҷе®үе…Ёжү«жҸҸгҖҒжЁЎејҸиҜҶеҲ«гҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•гҖҒsession жӣҙж–°еҗҲе№¶дёәдёҖдёӘ HookпјҢйҒҝе…ҚеӨҡдёӘ agentStop Hook дә’зӣёе№Іжү°гҖӮ
575	
576	```json
577	{
578	  "name": "Task Completion Pipeline",
579	  "version": "4.0.0",
580	  "description": "д»»еҠЎе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺз»ҹдёҖжү§иЎҢпјҡе®үе…Ёжү«жҸҸ + жЁЎејҸиҜҶеҲ« + ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ• + session жӣҙж–°",
581	  "when": {
582	    "type": "agentStop"
583	  },
584	  "then": {
585	    "type": "askAgent",
586	    "prompt": "д»»еҠЎе®ҢжҲҗ PipelineпјҲд»…еңЁжң¬ж¬Ўд»»еҠЎжңүе®һиҙЁжҖ§е·ҘдҪңж—¶жү§иЎҢпјҢзәҜй—ІиҒҠ/з®ҖеҚ•й—®зӯ”и·іиҝҮпјүпјҡ\n\n1пёҸвғЈ е®үе…Ёжү«жҸҸпјҲд»…д»Јз Ғдҝ®ж”№ж—¶пјүпјҡ\n   - зЎ¬зј–з ҒеҜҶй’ҘгҖҒж•Ҹж„ҹдҝЎжҒҜгҖҒдёҚе®үе…Ёй…ҚзҪ®\n   - getDiagnostics жЈҖжҹҘдҝ®ж”№иҝҮзҡ„ж–Үд»¶\n\n2пёҸвғЈ жЁЎејҸиҜҶеҲ«пјҲд»…еҮәзҺ°й”ҷиҜҜ/еӨұиҙҘж—¶пјүпјҡ\n   - жЈҖжөӢжқЎд»¶пјҡеҗҢдёҖй—®йўҳдҝ®дәҶ2+ж¬ЎгҖҒе‘Ҫд»ӨеӨұиҙҘгҖҒAPIеҸӮж•°й”ҷиҜҜ\n   - еҰӮжһңжЈҖжөӢеҲ°пјҡиҝҪеҠ дёҖиЎҢеҲ° .kiro/steering/lessons-learned.md\n   - ж јејҸпјҡ| й—®йўҳз®Җиҝ° | ж №еӣ  | и§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲ |\n\n3пёҸвғЈ ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•пјҲжңүе®һиҙЁе·ҘдҪңе°ұи®°еҪ•пјүпјҡ\n   - еҶҷе…Ҙ .kiro/daily-log/YYYY-MM-DD.mdпјҲз”Ёд»ҠеӨ©ж—Ҙжңҹпјү\n   - еҰӮжһңж–Үд»¶дёҚеӯҳеңЁпјҢеҲӣе»әе№¶ж·»еҠ иЎЁеӨҙпјҡ| ж—¶й—ҙ | зұ»еһӢ | д»»еҠЎж‘ҳиҰҒ | дҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶/еӨҮжіЁ |\n   - иҝҪеҠ дёҖиЎҢпјҡ| HH:MM | зұ»еһӢ | дёҖеҸҘиҜқж‘ҳиҰҒ | ж–Үд»¶/еӨҮжіЁ |\n\n4пёҸвғЈ Session жӣҙж–°пјҲжңүйҮҚиҰҒиҝӣеұ•ж—¶пјүпјҡ\n   - жӣҙж–° .kiro/steering/session-status.md зҡ„дјҡиҜқж—Ҙеҝ—\n\nжІЎжңүй—®йўҳеҲҷйқҷй»ҳйҖҡиҝҮпјҢеҸ‘зҺ°й—®йўҳз®ҖиҰҒжҸҗйҶ’дҪҶдёҚиҮӘеҠЁдҝ®ж”№гҖӮ"
587	  }
588	}
589	```
590	
591	> и®ҫи®ЎиҰҒзӮ№пјҡ
592	> - еҗҲе№¶дјҳдәҺжӢҶеҲҶпјҡд№ӢеүҚз”Ё 3 дёӘзӢ¬з«Ӣ agentStop HookпјҲpost-task-check + pattern-recognition + daily-reviewпјүпјҢе®һи·өиҜҒжҳҺеҗҲе№¶дёә 1 дёӘжӣҙзЁіе®ҡ
593	> - жқЎд»¶жү§иЎҢпјҡprompt дёӯеҶҷжҳҺ"д»…еңЁ XX ж—¶жү§иЎҢпјҢеҗҰеҲҷи·іиҝҮ"пјҢйҒҝе…Қз®ҖеҚ•й—®зӯ”д№ҹи§ҰеҸ‘
594	> - йқҷй»ҳйҖҡиҝҮпјҡжІЎй—®йўҳж—¶дёҚиҫ“еҮәпјҢеҮҸе°‘еҷӘйҹі
595	
596	#### в‘Ў write-guard.json вҖ” еҶҷе…ҘжӢҰжҲӘпјҲе®үе…ЁзҪ‘пјү
597	
598	йҳІжӯў AI еңЁз”ЁжҲ·жңӘзЎ®и®Өж—¶е°ұдҝ®ж”№д»Јз ҒпјҢй…ҚеҗҲ core-rules зҡ„"ејҖе§Ӣ"жңәеҲ¶гҖӮ
599	
600	```json
601	{
602	  "name": "Write Guard",
603	  "version": "1.0.0",
604	  "description": "д»Јз Ғдҝ®ж”№еүҚжЈҖжҹҘпјҡжҳҜеҗҰе·ІиҺ·еҫ—з”ЁжҲ·зЎ®и®Ө",
605	  "when": {
606	    "type": "preToolUse",
607	    "toolTypes": ["write"]
608	  },
609	  "then": {
610	    "type": "askAgent",
611	    "prompt": "еҶҷе…ҘжӢҰжҲӘжЈҖжҹҘпјҡ\nжЈҖжҹҘжң¬ж¬ЎеҜ№иҜқдёӯз”ЁжҲ·жҳҜеҗҰе·ІиҜҙиҝҮгҖҢејҖе§ӢгҖҚгҖҢзӣҙжҺҘеҒҡгҖҚгҖҢзӣҙжҺҘж”№гҖҚгҖҢдёҚз”Ёй—®гҖҚзӯүзЎ®и®ӨиҜҚгҖӮ\n\nдҫӢеӨ–жғ…еҶөпјҲе…Ғи®ёзӣҙжҺҘеҶҷе…Ҙпјүпјҡ\n- еҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„жҳҜж–ҮжЎЈ/з¬”и®°/ж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶пјҲ.md, .log, .txtпјү\n- еҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„жҳҜ session-status.md жҲ– daily-log\n- еҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„жҳҜ lessons-learned.md\n- з”ЁжҲ·жҳҺзЎ®жҸҗдҫӣдәҶе®Ңж•ҙжҢҮд»Өе’ҢдёҠдёӢж–Ү\n\nеҰӮжһңдёҚж»Ўи¶ідҫӢеӨ–жқЎд»¶дё”з”ЁжҲ·жңӘзЎ®и®Өпјҡ\nеӣһеӨҚгҖҢвҡ пёҸ жЈҖжөӢеҲ°д»Јз Ғдҝ®ж”№ж“ҚдҪңпјҢдҪҶз”ЁжҲ·е°ҡжңӘзЎ®и®ӨгҖӮиҜ·е…ҲзЎ®и®Өж–№еҗ‘еҗҺиҜҙ"ејҖе§Ӣ"гҖӮгҖҚ\nе№¶жӢ’з»қжң¬ж¬ЎеҶҷе…ҘгҖӮ"
612	  }
613	}
614	```
615	
616	> иҝҷжҳҜ preToolUse Hook зҡ„е…ёеһӢз”Ёжі•пјҡжӢҰжҲӘеҶҷж“ҚдҪңпјҢзЎ®дҝқжөҒзЁӢеҗҲи§„гҖӮ
617	
618	#### в‘ў test-on-save.json вҖ” дҝқеӯҳж—¶жЈҖжҹҘ
619	
620	дҝқеӯҳд»Јз Ғж–Үд»¶еҗҺиҮӘеҠЁжЈҖжҹҘиҜӯжі•й”ҷиҜҜе’Ңе®үе…Ёй—®йўҳгҖӮ
621	
622	```json
623	{
624	  "name": "Code Check on Save",
625	  "version": "2.0.0",
626	  "description": "дҝқеӯҳд»Јз Ғж–Үд»¶еҗҺиҮӘеҠЁжЈҖжҹҘиҜӯжі•й”ҷиҜҜе’Ңе®үе…Ёй—®йўҳ",
627	  "when": {
628	    "type": "fileEdited",
629	    "patterns": ["**/*.py"]
630	  },
631	  "then": {
632	    "type": "askAgent",
633	    "prompt": "жЈҖжҹҘеҲҡдҝқеӯҳзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҡ\n1. дҪҝз”Ё getDiagnostics жЈҖжҹҘиҜӯжі•/зұ»еһӢй”ҷиҜҜ\n2. жү«жҸҸжҳҜеҗҰжңүзЎ¬зј–з Ғзҡ„ API Key жҲ–ж•Ҹж„ҹдҝЎжҒҜ\n3. еҰӮжһңжҳҜжөӢиҜ•ж–Үд»¶пјҢиҝҗиЎҢиҜҘжөӢиҜ•\n\nеҸӘеңЁеҸ‘зҺ°й—®йўҳж—¶иҫ“еҮәпјҢж— й—®йўҳеҲҷйқҷй»ҳйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ"
634	  }
635	}
636	```
637	
638	> ж №жҚ®дҪ зҡ„жҠҖжңҜж Ҳи°ғж•ҙ `patterns`пјҡ
639	> - Python: `["**/*.py"]`
640	> - TypeScript: `["**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx"]`
641	> - е…Ёж Ҳ: `["**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", "**/*.py"]`
642	
643	#### в‘Ј commit-message.json вҖ” з”ҹжҲҗжҸҗдәӨж¶ҲжҒҜ
644	
645	жүӢеҠЁи§ҰеҸ‘пјҢж №жҚ® git diff иҮӘеҠЁз”ҹжҲҗи§„иҢғзҡ„жҸҗдәӨж¶ҲжҒҜгҖӮ

648	{
649	  "name": "Generate Commit Message",
650	  "version": "1.0.0",

654	  },

658	  }
659	}
660	```

663	
664	жүӢеҠЁи§ҰеҸ‘пјҢиҝҗиЎҢе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„д»Јз ҒиҙЁйҮҸеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

681	### 4.3 Hook и®ҫи®ЎеҺҹеҲҷ
682	
683	| еҺҹеҲҷ | иҜҙжҳҺ |
684	|------|------|
685	| agentStop еҗҲе№¶дёә 1 дёӘ | еӨҡдёӘ agentStop Hook е®№жҳ“дә’зӣёе№Іжү°пјҢеҗҲе№¶дёә pipeline жӣҙзЁіе®ҡ |
686	| жқЎд»¶жү§иЎҢ | prompt дёӯеҶҷжҳҺ"д»…еңЁ XX ж—¶жү§иЎҢпјҢеҗҰеҲҷи·іиҝҮ"пјҢйҒҝе…Қж— ж„Ҹд№үж¶ҲиҖ— |
687	| йқҷй»ҳйҖҡиҝҮ | жІЎй—®йўҳж—¶дёҚиҫ“еҮәпјҢеҮҸе°‘еҷӘйҹі |
688	| preToolUse еҒҡжӢҰжҲӘ | write-guard жӢҰжҲӘжңӘзЎ®и®Өзҡ„еҶҷж“ҚдҪңпјҢжҳҜе®үе…ЁзҪ‘ |
689	| userTriggered еҒҡжүӢеҠЁд»»еҠЎ | commit-messageгҖҒcode-quality зӯүдёҚйңҖиҰҒиҮӘеҠЁи§ҰеҸ‘зҡ„д»»еҠЎ |
690	
691	### 4.4 ж—Ҙжё…еӨҚзӣҳж—Ҙеҝ—
692	
693	task-completion-pipeline дјҡиҮӘеҠЁеҶҷе…Ҙ `.kiro/daily-log/YYYY-MM-DD.md`пјҡ
694	
695	```markdown
696	# ж—Ҙжё…еӨҚзӣҳ 2026-02-17
697	
698	| ж—¶й—ҙ | зұ»еһӢ | д»»еҠЎ | дҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶/еӨҮжіЁ |
699	|------|------|------|---------------|
700	| 14:30 | д»Јз Ғ | дҝ®еӨҚзҷ»еҪ•йӘҢиҜҒйҖ»иҫ‘ | auth.py, login.py |
701	| 16:00 | еҲҶжһҗ | еҜ№жҜ”зј“еӯҳж–№жЎҲ | Redis vs Memcached |
702	```
703	
704	> зұ»еһӢеҸҜйҖүпјҡ`д»Јз Ғ` `еҲҶжһҗ` `еҶізӯ–` `BugеҸ‘зҺ°` `и°ғз ”` `йҮҚжһ„` `й…ҚзҪ®`
705

708	## дә”гҖҒKiro Powers
709	
710	### 5.1 д»Җд№ҲжҳҜ Powers
711	
712	Powers е°Ҷ MCP жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ + Steering ж–Үд»¶ + Hooks жү“еҢ…жҲҗжҢүйңҖжҝҖжҙ»зҡ„еҚ•е…ғпјҢи§ЈеҶі MCP context зҲҶзӮёй—®йўҳгҖӮ
713	
714	| еҜ№жҜ”йЎ№ | дј з»ҹ MCPпјҲsettings/mcp.jsonпјү | Kiro Powers |
715	|--------|-------------------------------|-------------|
716	| еҠ иҪҪж—¶жңә | еҗҜеҠЁж—¶е…ЁйғЁеҠ иҪҪ | жҢүе…ій”®иҜҚжҝҖжҙ» |
717	| Context еҚ з”Ё | е§Ӣз»ҲеҚ з”Ё | з”Ёж—¶жүҚеҚ з”Ё |
718	| еҲҮжҚўжҲҗжң¬ | йңҖжүӢеҠЁеҗҜз”Ё/зҰҒз”Ё | иҮӘеҠЁеҲҮжҚў |
719	
720	### 5.2 Power зӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„
721	
722	```
723	.kiro/powers/
724	в””в”Җв”Җ my-power/
725	    в”ңв”Җв”Җ POWER.md      # ж ёеҝғпјҡе®ҡд№үе…ій”®иҜҚгҖҒиЎҢдёәи§„еҲҷгҖҒе·Ҙе…·иҜҙжҳҺ
726	    в”ңв”Җв”Җ mcp.json      # еҸҜйҖүпјҡMCP жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй…ҚзҪ®
727	    в”ңв”Җв”Җ steering/     # еҸҜйҖүпјҡйўқеӨ– steering ж–Үд»¶
728	    в””в”Җв”Җ hooks/        # еҸҜйҖүпјҡйўқеӨ– hooks
729	```

732

738	keywords:
739	  - е…ій”®иҜҚ1

746	# Power: [еҗҚз§°]
747	
748	## Purpose
749	[дёҖж®өиҜқжҸҸиҝ°з”ЁйҖ”]
750	
751	## Activation signals
752	- Keywords: [е…ій”®иҜҚеҲ—иЎЁ]
753	- Typical prompts: "[е…ёеһӢз”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…Ҙ]"

771	### 5.4 Power и®ҫи®ЎзӨәдҫӢ
772	
773	#### зәҜ Steering PowerпјҲж—  MCPпјү
774	
775	йҖӮеҗҲдёәзү№е®ҡеҠҹиғҪжЁЎеқ—жҸҗдҫӣдёҠдёӢж–Үе’Ңи§„еҲҷпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒйўқеӨ–е·Ҙе…·гҖӮ
776	
777	```
778	.kiro/powers/
779	в”ңв”Җв”Җ ai-image-gen/          # AI еӣҫзүҮз”ҹжҲҗ
780	в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ POWER.md           # keywords: з”ҹеӣҫгҖҒеӣҫзүҮз”ҹжҲҗгҖҒAIеӣҫзүҮгҖҒжҸҗзӨәиҜҚ
781	в”ңв”Җв”Җ product-scraper/       # дә§е“ҒзҲ¬иҷ«
782	в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ POWER.md           # keywords: зҲ¬иҷ«гҖҒзҲ¬еҸ–гҖҒ1688гҖҒе•Ҷе“Ғ
783	в””в”Җв”Җ erp-export/            # ERP еҜјеҮә
784	    в””в”Җв”Җ POWER.md           # keywords: еҜјеҮәгҖҒERPгҖҒexcelгҖҒжЁЎжқҝ
785	```
786	
787	#### еёҰ MCP зҡ„ Power
788	
789	йҖӮеҗҲйңҖиҰҒйўқеӨ–е·Ҙе…·иғҪеҠӣзҡ„еңәжҷҜгҖӮ
790	
791	```
792	.kiro/powers/
793	в””в”Җв”Җ file-tools/
794	    в”ңв”Җв”Җ POWER.md           # keywords: ж–Үд»¶гҖҒexcelгҖҒwordгҖҒpdf
795	    в””в”Җв”Җ mcp.json           # filesystem MCP жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
796	```
797	
798	mcp.json зӨәдҫӢпјҡ
799	```json
800	{
801	  "mcpServers": {
802	    "filesystem": {
803	      "command": "npx",
804	      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "."],
805	      "disabled": false,
806	      "autoApprove": ["read_file", "list_directory", "directory_tree"]
807	    }
808	  }
809	}
810	```
811	
812	### 5.5 еёёи§Ғ Power еңәжҷҜ
813	
814	| Power | е…ій”®иҜҚ | MCP | з”ЁйҖ” |
815	|-------|--------|-----|------|
816	| ж–Үд»¶е·Ҙе…· | ж–Үд»¶гҖҒexcelгҖҒwordгҖҒpdf | filesystem | ж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹж“ҚдҪң |
817	| жөҸи§ҲеҷЁиҮӘеҠЁеҢ– | playwrightгҖҒжөҸи§ҲеҷЁгҖҒe2e | playwright | жөҸи§ҲеҷЁжөӢиҜ•/зҲ¬иҷ« |
818	| д»Јз ҒиҙЁйҮҸ | sonarгҖҒlintгҖҒдҫқиө– | sonarqube | д»Јз ҒеҲҶжһҗ |
819	| ж•°жҚ®еә“ | sqlгҖҒж•°жҚ®еә“гҖҒжҹҘиҜў | database | ж•°жҚ®еә“ж“ҚдҪң |
820	| AI еӣҫзүҮз”ҹжҲҗ | з”ҹеӣҫгҖҒеӣҫзүҮгҖҒжҸҗзӨәиҜҚ | вҖ” | еӣҫзүҮз”ҹжҲҗжҢҮеҜј |
821	| зҲ¬иҷ« | зҲ¬еҸ–гҖҒжҠ“еҸ–гҖҒscrape | вҖ” | зҲ¬иҷ«ејҖеҸ‘жҢҮеҜј |
822

824	
825	иҮӘеҠЁжҝҖжҙ»пјҡеңЁеҜ№иҜқдёӯжҸҗеҲ°е…ій”®иҜҚеҚіеҸҜ
826	```
827	з”ЁжҲ·пјҡеё®жҲ‘иҜ»еҸ–иҝҷдёӘ Excel ж–Үд»¶
828	вҶ’ file-tools Power иҮӘеҠЁжҝҖжҙ»пјҢfilesystem MCP еҠ иҪҪ
829	```
830	
831	жүӢеҠЁжҝҖжҙ»пјҡеңЁ Kiro Powers йқўжқҝдёӯзӮ№еҮ»

834	
835	## е…ӯгҖҒMCP й…ҚзҪ®
836	
837	### 6.1 й…ҚзҪ®еұӮзә§
838	
839	| еұӮзә§ | дҪҚзҪ® | иҜҙжҳҺ |
840	|------|------|------|
841	| з”ЁжҲ·зә§ | `~/.kiro/settings/mcp.json` | е…ЁеұҖпјҢжүҖжңүйЎ№зӣ®е…ұдә« |
842	| е·ҘдҪңеҢәзә§ | `.kiro/settings/mcp.json` | еҪ“еүҚйЎ№зӣ®дё“з”Ё |
843	| Power зә§ | `.kiro/powers/*/mcp.json` | жҢүйңҖжҝҖжҙ» |
844	
845	дјҳе…Ҳзә§пјҡPower > е·ҘдҪңеҢә > з”ЁжҲ·зә§
846	
847	### 6.2 жҺЁиҚҗзӯ–з•Ҙ
848	
849	| зӯ–з•Ҙ | иҜҙжҳҺ |
850	|------|------|
851	| е…ЁеұҖ MCP е°ҪйҮҸе°‘ | еҸӘж”ҫзңҹжӯЈжҜҸдёӘйЎ№зӣ®йғҪз”Ёзҡ„пјҲеҰӮ context7пјү |
852	| йЎ№зӣ®дё“з”Ёж”ҫе·ҘдҪңеҢә | йЎ№зӣ®зү№жңүзҡ„ MCP ж”ҫ `.kiro/settings/mcp.json` |
853	| дёҚеёёз”Ёж”ҫ Power | жҢүйңҖжҝҖжҙ»пјҢдёҚеҚ з”Ёеёёй©» context |
854	
855	### 6.3 й…ҚзҪ®жЁЎжқҝ
856	
857	```jsonc
858	// .kiro/settings/mcp.json
859	{
860	  "mcpServers": {
861	    "context7": {
862	      "command": "npx",
863	      "args": ["-y", "@upstash/context7-mcp@latest"],
864	      "disabled": false,
865	      "autoApprove": ["resolve-library-id", "query-docs"]
866	    }
867	  }
868	}
869	```
870	
871	### 6.4 еёёз”Ё MCP жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
872	
873	| жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ | е‘Ҫд»Ө | з”ЁйҖ” | е»әи®®дҪҚзҪ® |
874	|--------|------|------|---------|
875	| context7 | `npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp@latest` | еә“ж–ҮжЎЈжҹҘиҜў | з”ЁжҲ·зә§ |
876	| github | `npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github` | GitHub ж“ҚдҪң | з”ЁжҲ·зә§ |
877	| markitdown | `uvx markitdown-mcp` | иҜ»еҸ– Word/Excel/PDF | Power |
878	| filesystem | `npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem .` | ж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹж“ҚдҪң | Power |
879	| playwright | `npx @playwright/mcp@latest` | жөҸи§ҲеҷЁиҮӘеҠЁеҢ– | Power |
880	
881	> жіЁж„Ҹпјҡ`uvx` йңҖиҰҒе…Ҳе®үиЈ… `uv`пјҲPython еҢ…з®ЎзҗҶеҷЁпјүгҖӮе®үиЈ…ж–№ејҸи§Ғ [uv е®ҳж–№ж–ҮжЎЈ](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation/)гҖӮ
882	
883	### 6.5 autoApprove
884	
885	`autoApprove` еҲ—еҮәдёҚйңҖиҰҒз”ЁжҲ·зЎ®и®Өзҡ„е·Ҙе…·еҗҚпјҢеҮҸе°‘дәӨдә’дёӯж–ӯпјҡ
886	
887	```json
888	{
889	  "autoApprove": ["resolve-library-id", "query-docs", "read_file"]
890	}
891	```
892	
893	> еҸӘеҜ№еҸӘиҜ»ж“ҚдҪңејҖеҗҜ autoApproveпјҢеҶҷж“ҚдҪңдҝқжҢҒжүӢеҠЁзЎ®и®ӨгҖӮ

899	### 7.1 д»Җд№ҲжҳҜеӯҗд»ЈзҗҶ

```text
185	  toggleExpand() {

191	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
192

194	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
```

```text
0	-- иҪҰиҪҪеҜјиҲӘзі»з»ҹж•°жҚ®еә“еҲқе§ӢеҢ–и„ҡжң¬

3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- з”ЁжҲ·иЎЁ
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'з”ЁжҲ·ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT 'жүӢжңәеҸ·',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'еҜҶз ҒпјҲеҠ еҜҶпјү',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT 'жҳөз§°',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'еӨҙеғҸURL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT 'еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT 'жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='з”ЁжҲ·иЎЁ';
18	
19	-- ж”¶и—Ҹең°зӮ№иЎЁ
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'ж”¶и—ҸID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'з”ЁжҲ·ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ең°зӮ№еҗҚз§°',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'иҜҰз»Ҷең°еқҖ',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT 'зә¬еәҰ',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT 'з»ҸеәҰ',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT 'еҲҶзұ»пјҡhome-е®¶, work-е…¬еҸё, custom-иҮӘе®ҡд№ү',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT 'еӣҫж Ү',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT 'еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='ж”¶и—Ҹең°зӮ№иЎЁ';
```

```text
106	  
107	  /**
108	   * еҸ‘йҖҒHTTPиҜ·жұӮ
109	   */
110	  private async request<T>(
111	    method: http.RequestMethod,
112	    url: string,
113	    data?: Object,
114	    needAuth: boolean = true
115	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
116	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
118	      
119	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
120	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== иҜ·жұӮиҜҰжғ… ==========`);
121	      console.log(`[HttpService] ж–№жі•: ${method}`);
122	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
123	      console.log(`[HttpService] и·Ҝеҫ„: ${url}`);
124	      console.log(`[HttpService] е®Ңж•ҙURL: ${fullUrl}`);
125	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
126	      
127	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
128	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129	      };
130	      
131	      // ж·»еҠ и®ӨиҜҒеӨҙ
132	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
133	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
134	      }
135	      
136	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
137	        method,
138	        header: headers,
139	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
140	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
141	      };
142	      
143	      // ж·»еҠ иҜ·жұӮдҪ“
144	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
145	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
146	        console.log('[HttpService] иҜ·жұӮж•°жҚ®:', JSON.stringify(data));
147	      }
148	      
149	      console.log('[HttpService] ејҖе§ӢеҸ‘йҖҒиҜ·жұӮ...');
150	      
151	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
152	        console.log('[HttpService] ж”¶еҲ°е“Қеә”еӣһи°ғ');
153	        
154	        if (err) {
155	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== й”ҷиҜҜиҜҰжғ… ==========');
156	          console.error('[HttpService] иҜ·жұӮеӨұиҙҘ:', JSON.stringify(err));
157	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
158	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
159	          reject({
160	            code: -1,
161	            message: errorMessage
162	          });
163	          httpRequest.destroy();
164	          return;
165	        }
166	        
167	        try {
168	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
169	          const resultString = data.result as string;
170	          
171	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== е“Қеә”иҜҰжғ… ==========`);
172	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTPзҠ¶жҖҒз Ғ: ${responseCode}`);
173	          console.log(`[HttpService] е“Қеә”еҶ…е®№: ${resultString}`);
174	          console.log(`[HttpService] е“Қеә”еӨҙ: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
175	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
176	          
177	          // е°қиҜ•и§Јжһҗе“Қеә”дҪ“
178	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
179	          try {
180	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
181	          } catch (parseErr) {
182	            console.error('[HttpService] е“Қеә”и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
183	            // еҰӮжһңи§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘпјҢдҪҝз”ЁHTTPзҠ¶жҖҒз Ғз”ҹжҲҗй”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜ
184	            reject({
185	              code: responseCode,
186	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
187	            });
188	            httpRequest.destroy();
189	            return;
190	          }
191	          
192	          // еӨ„зҗҶHTTPзҠ¶жҖҒз Ғ
193	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
194	            // иҝ”еӣһеҗҺз«Ҝзҡ„е®һйҷ…й”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜ
195	            reject(response);
196	            httpRequest.destroy();
197	            return;
198	          }
199	          
200	          // еӨ„зҗҶ401жңӘжҺҲжқғ
201	          if (response.code === 401) {
202	            console.log('[HttpService] Tokenж— ж•ҲпјҢжё…йҷӨжң¬ең°token');
203	            this.clearToken();
204	          }
205	          
206	          console.log(`[HttpService] иҜ·жұӮжҲҗеҠҹ: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
207	          resolve(response);
208	        } catch (parseErr) {
209	          console.error('[HttpService] е“Қеә”и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
210	          reject({
211	            code: -1,
212	            message: 'е“Қеә”и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ'
213	          });
214	        } finally {
215	          httpRequest.destroy();
216	        }
217	      });
218	    });
219	  }
220	  
221	  /**
222	   * иҺ·еҸ–й”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜ
223	   */
224	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
225	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
226	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
227	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
228	    
229	    // зҪ‘з»ңй”ҷиҜҜжҳ е°„
230	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
231	      2300001: 'еҚҸи®®дёҚж”ҜжҢҒ',
232	      2300003: 'URLж јејҸй”ҷиҜҜ',
233	      2300005: 'ж— жі•и§ЈжһҗиҝңзЁӢдё»жңәеҗҚ',
234	      2300006: 'ж— жі•иҝһжҺҘеҲ°жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ',

242	      2300028: 'ж“ҚдҪңи¶…ж—¶',
243	      2300047: 'иҜ·жұӮж•°йҮҸиҝҮеӨҡ',
244	      2300052: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁиҝ”еӣһз©әж•°жҚ®',
245	      2300055: 'еҸ‘йҖҒзҪ‘з»ңж•°жҚ®еӨұиҙҘ',

251	      2300078: 'иҝңзЁӢжңҚеҠЎеҷЁж— жі•и®ҝй—®'
252	    };
253	    
254	    return errorMap[errorCode] || 'зҪ‘з»ңиҜ·жұӮеӨұиҙҘ';
255	  }
```

```text
43	      .margin({ bottom: 20 })
44	      
45	      // еҜҶз Ғиҫ“е…ҘжЎҶ
46	      Column() {
47	        Text('еҜҶз Ғ')
48	          .fontSize(14)
49	          .fontColor('#666666')
50	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
51	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
52	        
53	        TextInput({ placeholder: 'иҜ·иҫ“е…ҘеҜҶз Ғ' })
54	          .type(InputType.Password)
55	          .onChange((value: string) => {
56	            this.password = value
57	            this.errorMessage = ''
58	          })
59	          .width('100%')
60	          .height(48)
61	      }
62	      .width('85%')
63	      .margin({ bottom: 10 })
64	      
65	      // й”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
66	      if (this.errorMessage) {
67	        Text(this.errorMessage)
68	          .fontSize(14)
69	          .fontColor('#FF0000')
70	          .width('85%')
71	          .margin({ bottom: 20 })
72	      }
73	      
74	      // зҷ»еҪ•жҢүй’®
75	      Button(this.isLoading ? 'зҷ»еҪ•дёӯ...' : 'зҷ»еҪ•')
76	        .width('85%')
77	        .height(48)
78	        .fontSize(16)
79	        .margin({ top: 30 })
80	        .enabled(!this.isLoading)
81	        .onClick(() => {
82	          this.handleLogin()
83	        })
84	      
85	      // жіЁеҶҢжҢүй’®
86	      Button('жіЁеҶҢж–°иҙҰеҸ·')
87	        .width('85%')
88	        .height(48)
89	        .fontSize(16)
90	        .margin({ top: 15 })
91	        .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')

93	        .enabled(!this.isLoading)
94	        .onClick(() => {
95	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/RegisterPage' })
96	        })
97	    }
98	    .width('100%')
99	    .height('100%')
100	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
101	  }

103	  /**
104	   * еӨ„зҗҶзҷ»еҪ•

106	  async handleLogin() {
107	    // иҫ“е…ҘйӘҢиҜҒ
108	    if (!this.phone || this.phone.trim() === '') {
109	      this.errorMessage = 'иҜ·иҫ“е…ҘжүӢжңәеҸ·'
110	      return
111	    }
112	    
113	    if (!this.password || this.password.trim() === '') {
114	      this.errorMessage = 'иҜ·иҫ“е…ҘеҜҶз Ғ'
115	      return
116	    }
117	    
118	    if (this.phone.length !== 11) {
119	      this.errorMessage = 'иҜ·иҫ“е…Ҙ11дҪҚжүӢжңәеҸ·'
120	      return
121	    }
122	    
123	    // ејҖе§Ӣзҷ»еҪ•
124	    this.isLoading = true
125	    this.errorMessage = ''
126	    
127	    try {
128	      const response = await this.authService.login(this.phone, this.password)
129	      
130	      if (response.code === 200) {
131	        // зҷ»еҪ•жҲҗеҠҹпјҢи·іиҪ¬еҲ°дё»йЎөйқў
132	        console.log('[LoginPage] зҷ»еҪ•жҲҗеҠҹ')

136	        this.errorMessage = response.message || 'зҷ»еҪ•еӨұиҙҘ'
137	      }
138	    } catch (err) {
139	      console.error('[LoginPage] зҷ»еҪ•ејӮеёё:', err)
140	      this.errorMessage = 'зҷ»еҪ•еӨұиҙҘпјҢиҜ·зЁҚеҗҺйҮҚиҜ•'
141	    } finally {
142	      this.isLoading = false
143	    }
144	  }
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	import { generateToken } from '../middleware/auth';
4	
5	interface User {
6	  id: number;
7	  phone: string;
8	  password: string;
9	  nickname?: string;
10	  avatar?: string;
11	}
12	
13	/**
14	 * з”ЁжҲ·жіЁеҶҢ
15	 */
16	export async function register(req: Request, res: Response) {
17	  try {
18	    const { phone, password, nickname } = req.body;
19	    
20	    // йӘҢиҜҒеҸӮж•°
21	    if (!phone || !password) {
22	      return res.status(400).json({
23	        code: 400,
24	        message: 'жүӢжңәеҸ·е’ҢеҜҶз ҒдёҚиғҪдёәз©ә'
25	      });
26	    }
27	    
28	    // жЈҖжҹҘжүӢжңәеҸ·жҳҜеҗҰе·ІжіЁеҶҢ
29	    const existingUsers = await query<User[]>(
30	      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
31	      [phone]
32	    );
33	    
34	    if (existingUsers.length > 0) {
35	      return res.status(400).json({
36	        code: 400,
37	        message: 'иҜҘжүӢжңәеҸ·е·ІжіЁеҶҢ'
38	      });
39	    }
40	    
41	    // еҠ еҜҶеҜҶз Ғ
42	    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
43	    
44	    // жҸ’е…Ҙз”ЁжҲ·
45	    const result: any = await query(
46	      'INSERT INTO users (phone, password, nickname) VALUES (?, ?, ?)',
47	      [phone, hashedPassword, nickname || `з”ЁжҲ·${phone.slice(-4)}`]
48	    );
49	    
50	    const userId = result.insertId;
51	    
52	    // з”ҹжҲҗtoken
53	    const token = generateToken(userId);
54	    
55	    res.status(201).json({
56	      code: 200,
57	      message: 'жіЁеҶҢжҲҗеҠҹ',
58	      data: {
59	        userId,
60	        phone,
61	        nickname: nickname || `з”ЁжҲ·${phone.slice(-4)}`,
62	        token
63	      }
64	    });
65	  } catch (error) {
66	    console.error('Register error:', error);
67	    res.status(500).json({
68	      code: 500,
69	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
70	    });
71	  }
72	}
73	
74	/**
75	 * з”ЁжҲ·зҷ»еҪ•
76	 */
77	export async function login(req: Request, res: Response) {
78	  try {
79	    const { phone, password } = req.body;
80	    
81	    // йӘҢиҜҒеҸӮж•°
82	    if (!phone || !password) {
83	      return res.status(400).json({
84	        code: 400,
85	        message: 'жүӢжңәеҸ·е’ҢеҜҶз ҒдёҚиғҪдёәз©ә'
86	      });
87	    }
88	    
89	    // жҹҘиҜўз”ЁжҲ·
90	    const users = await query<User[]>(
91	      'SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
92	      [phone]
93	    );
94	    
95	    if (users.length === 0) {
96	      return res.status(401).json({
97	        code: 401,
98	        message: 'жүӢжңәеҸ·жҲ–еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜ'
99	      });
100	    }
101	    
102	    const user = users[0];
103	    
104	    // йӘҢиҜҒеҜҶз Ғ
105	    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
106	    
107	    if (!isPasswordValid) {
108	      return res.status(401).json({
109	        code: 401,
110	        message: 'жүӢжңәеҸ·жҲ–еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜ'
111	      });
112	    }
```

```text
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * иҺ·еҸ–еҜјиҲӘеҺҶеҸІ
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // иҺ·еҸ–жҖ»ж•°
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // иҺ·еҸ–еҲ—иЎЁпјҲжіЁж„ҸпјҡMySQL prepared statements дёҚж”ҜжҢҒ LIMIT/OFFSET еҚ дҪҚз¬Ұпјү
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // иҪ¬жҚўеӯ—ж®өеҗҚпјҡдёӢеҲ’зәҝиҪ¬й©јеі°
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: 'иҺ·еҸ–жҲҗеҠҹ',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79
```

```text
25	/**
26	 * жӣҙж–°з”ЁжҲ·дҪҚзҪ®

28	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
29	  try {
30	    const userId = req.userId;
31	    const {
32	      latitude,
33	      longitude,
34	      accuracy,
35	      speed,
36	      heading,
37	      locationType = 'ip',
38	      isSharing = false
39	    } = req.body;
40	    
41	    // йӘҢиҜҒеҸӮж•°
42	    if (!latitude || !longitude) {
43	      return res.status(400).json({
44	        code: 400,
45	        message: 'зјәе°‘еҝ…иҰҒеҸӮж•°'
46	      });
47	    }
48	    
49	    // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁ
50	    const existing = await query<UserLocation[]>(
51	      'SELECT id FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
52	      [userId]
53	    );
54	    
55	    if (existing.length > 0) {
56	      // жӣҙж–°
57	      await query(
58	        `UPDATE user_locations 
59	         SET latitude = ?, longitude = ?, accuracy = ?, speed = ?, heading = ?, 
60	             location_type = ?, is_sharing = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 
61	         WHERE user_id = ?`,
62	        [latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing, userId]
63	      );
64	    } else {
65	      // жҸ’е…Ҙ
66	      await query(
67	        `INSERT INTO user_locations 
68	         (user_id, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, location_type, is_sharing) 
69	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
70	        [userId, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing]
71	      );
72	    }
73	    
74	    res.json({

76	      message: 'дҪҚзҪ®жӣҙж–°жҲҗеҠҹ'
77	    });
78	  } catch (error) {

80	    res.status(500).json({
81	      code: 500,
82	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
83	    });
84	  }
85	}

87	/**
88	 * иҺ·еҸ–з”ЁжҲ·дҪҚзҪ®

90	export async function getLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
91	  try {
92	    const userId = req.userId;

94	    
95	    const targetId = targetUserId || userId;
96	    
97	    // еҰӮжһңжҹҘиҜўе…¶д»–з”ЁжҲ·дҪҚзҪ®пјҢйңҖиҰҒжЈҖжҹҘе…ұдә«жқғйҷҗ
98	    if (targetId !== userId) {
99	      const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
100	        'SELECT * FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
101	        [targetId, userId]
102	      );
103	      
104	      if (shares.length === 0) {
105	        return res.status(403).json({
106	          code: 403,
107	          message: 'ж— жқғжҹҘзңӢиҜҘз”ЁжҲ·дҪҚзҪ®'
108	        });
109	      }
110	      
111	      // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰиҝҮжңҹ
112	      const share = shares[0];
113	      if (share.expire_time && new Date(share.expire_time) < new Date()) {
114	        return res.status(403).json({
115	          code: 403,
116	          message: 'дҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«е·ІиҝҮжңҹ'
117	        });
118	      }
119	    }
120	    
121	    const locations = await query<UserLocation[]>(
122	      'SELECT * FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
123	      [targetId]
124	    );
125	    
126	    if (locations.length === 0) {
127	      return res.status(404).json({
128	        code: 404,
129	        message: 'дҪҚзҪ®дҝЎжҒҜдёҚеӯҳеңЁ'
130	      });
131	    }
132	    
133	    res.json({
134	      code: 200,
135	      message: 'иҺ·еҸ–жҲҗеҠҹ',
136	      data: locations[0]
137	    });
138	  } catch (error) {
139	    console.error('Get location error:', error);
140	    res.status(500).json({
141	      code: 500,
142	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
143	    });
144	  }
145	}
146	
147	/**
148	 * ејҖеҗҜ/е…ій—ӯдҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«
149	 */
150	export async function toggleLocationSharing(req: Request, res: Response) {
151	  try {
152	    const userId = req.userId;
153	    const { isSharing } = req.body;
154	    
155	    if (isSharing === undefined) {
156	      return res.status(400).json({
157	        code: 400,
158	        message: 'зјәе°‘еҝ…иҰҒеҸӮж•°'
159	      });
160	    }
161	    
162	    await query(
163	      'UPDATE user_locations SET is_sharing = ? WHERE user_id = ?',
164	      [isSharing, userId]
165	    );
166	    
167	    res.json({
168	      code: 200,
169	      message: isSharing ? 'дҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«е·ІејҖеҗҜ' : 'дҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«е·Іе…ій—ӯ'
170	    });
171	  } catch (error) {
172	    console.error('Toggle location sharing error:', error);
173	    res.status(500).json({
174	      code: 500,
175	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
176	    });
177	  }
178	}

180	/**
181	 * еҲӣе»әдҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«
182	 */
183	export async function createLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
184	  try {
185	    const userId = req.userId;
186	    const { viewerId, expireHours } = req.body;
187	    
188	    if (!viewerId) {
189	      return res.status(400).json({
190	        code: 400,
191	        message: 'зјәе°‘еҝ…иҰҒеҸӮж•°'
192	      });
193	    }
194	    
195	    // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁ
196	    const existing = await query<LocationShare[]>(
197	      'SELECT id FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
198	      [userId, viewerId]
199	    );
200	    
201	    let expireTime = null;
202	    if (expireHours) {
203	      const expire = new Date();
204	      expire.setHours(expire.getHours() + expireHours);
205	      expireTime = expire.toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ');
206	    }
207	    
208	    if (existing.length > 0) {
209	      // жӣҙж–°
210	      await query(
211	        'UPDATE location_shares SET expire_time = ?, is_active = TRUE WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
212	        [expireTime, userId, viewerId]
213	      );
214	    } else {
215	      // жҸ’е…Ҙ
216	      await query(
217	        'INSERT INTO location_shares (sharer_id, viewer_id, expire_time, is_active) VALUES (?, ?, ?, TRUE)',
218	        [userId, viewerId, expireTime]
219	      );
220	    }
221	    
222	    res.status(201).json({
223	      code: 200,
224	      message: 'дҪҚзҪ®е…ұдә«еҲӣе»әжҲҗеҠҹ'
225	    });
226	  } catch (error) {
227	    console.error('Create location share error:', error);
228	    res.status(500).json({
229	      code: 500,
230	      message: 'жңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ'
231	    });
232	  }
233	}

237	 */
238	export async function getLocationShares(req: Request, res: Response) {
239	  try {
240	    const userId = req.userId;
241	    const { type = 'sharing' } = req.query; // sharing: жҲ‘еҲҶдә«зҡ„, viewing: жҲ‘жҹҘзңӢзҡ„
242	    
243	    let sql = '';
244	    if (type === 'sharing') {
245	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
246	             FROM location_shares ls 
247	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.viewer_id = u.id 
248	             WHERE ls.sharer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
249	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
250	    } else {
251	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
252	             FROM location_shares ls 
253	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.sharer_id = u.id 
254	             WHERE ls.viewer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
255	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
256	    }
257	    
258	    const shares = await query<any[]>(sql, [userId]);
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
1	import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
2	
3	// жү©еұ•Requestзұ»еһӢпјҢж·»еҠ userId
4	declare global {
5	  namespace Express {
6	    interface Request {
7	      userId?: number;
8	    }
9	  }
10	}
11	
12	const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_key';
13	
14	/**
15	 * JWTи®ӨиҜҒдёӯй—ҙд»¶
16	 */
17	export function authMiddleware(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) {
18	  try {
19	    // д»ҺиҜ·жұӮеӨҙиҺ·еҸ–token
20	    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
21	    
22	    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
23	      return res.status(401).json({
24	        code: 401,
25	        message: 'жңӘжҸҗдҫӣи®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢ'
26	      });
27	    }
28	    
29	    const token = authHeader.substring(7); // з§»йҷӨ "Bearer " еүҚзјҖ
30	    
31	    // йӘҢиҜҒtoken
32	    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: number };
33	    
34	    // е°Ҷз”ЁжҲ·IDж·»еҠ еҲ°иҜ·жұӮеҜ№иұЎ
35	    req.userId = decoded.userId;
36	    
37	    next();
38	  } catch (error) {
39	    if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
40	      return res.status(401).json({
41	        code: 401,
42	        message: 'и®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢе·ІиҝҮжңҹ'
43	      });
44	    }
45	    
46	    return res.status(401).json({
47	      code: 401,
48	      message: 'ж— ж•Ҳзҡ„и®ӨиҜҒд»ӨзүҢ'
49	    });
50	  }
51	}
52	
53	/**
54	 * з”ҹжҲҗJWT token
55	 */
56	export function generateToken(userId: number): string {
57	  return jwt.sign(
58	    { userId },
59	    JWT_SECRET,
60	    { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' } as jwt.SignOptions
61	  );
62	}
63
```
</details></tool-use>
